title: King Log & King Stork
content:
The Frogs prayed to Jove for a king:
    "Not a log, but a livelier thing."
    Jove sent them a Stork,
    Who did royal work,
    For he gobbled them up, did their king.

    Don't Have Kings
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Walter Crane delivers a powerful performance in "King Log & King Stork"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
